4. See error ...

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

<!-- A clear and concise description of what actually happened. -->

## Environment Information

Please provide the following environment details:

- **Hardware Platform**: <!-- e.g., STM32F407VGT6, ESP32, Raspberry Pi 4 -->
- **Compiler Toolchain**: <!-- e.g., GCC 10.3, ARM Clang, IAR -->
  - Version: 
- **Host OS (Development PC)**: <!-- Windows, Ubuntu Linux, macOS -->
- **Git Branch / Version**: <!-- e.g., main, v1.0.0, or Commit SHA -->
- **Other Relevant Tools**: <!-- e.g., OpenOCD, GDB, CMake version -->

## Attachments

<!-- If applicable, please attach or link:
- Full compilation output (for build-time errors)
- Runtime or debugger logs
- A minimal reproducible code snippet
- Modified configuration files or linker scripts
- Screenshots or video recordings demonstrating the bug
